lines.name: Outer Reach
lines.note: Superheroes fracture through encounters and hostile space toward the void — Fractured Timelines to Deep Hull

lines.name: Slow Burn
lines.note: Blazing anime energy cools through time paradoxes, apocalypse, and quiet machines into dystopian control — Blazing Spirit to Pleasure Prison

lines.name: Long Descent
lines.note: Kaiju destruction through contagion and scorched earth, past early cinema, through cold space to the desert — The Roar to Desert Cathedral

lines.name: Signal Line
lines.note: Villeneuve's worlds through cyberpunk and dark capes into erased memory — Desert Cathedral to Strange Mirrors

lines.name: Projection Booth
lines.note: Cyberpunk doctrine through anime velocity, virtual worlds, and early cinema to the mad scientist's lab — Neon Doctrine to The Laboratory
